mode.title: Mode
mode.description: account_tracking scrapes listed handles. hashtag_search prospects via hashtags.

maxPostsPerHandle.title: Max posts per handle
maxPostsPerHandle.description: Maximum number of recent posts to fetch per handle.

maxHashtagResults.title: Max hashtag results
maxHashtagResults.description: Maximum posts to collect per hashtag search.

sessionUsername.title: Session account username
sessionUsername.description: Instagram username for the dedicated session account. Store credentials in Actor environment variables, not here.

followerBaselinePath.title: Follower baseline (KV key)
followerBaselinePath.description: Key-value store key holding previous follower counts for delta calculation.
